specific_question: Will the Elexion Automotive asset lifecycle management team have implemented the predictive maintenance scheduling tool company-wide by May 1, 2026?
answer: No. According to an internal deployment roadmap issued on October 7, 2025, the predictive maintenance scheduling tool is expected to continue in a phased rollout, with full adoption targeted for early 2027.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
